text:
{
  "fixed_xml": "<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, 
    in einer Connex. mit der V�lcker-Historie, 
    <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. 
    <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> 
    <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. 
    <PLACE>Amsterdam</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME>
    <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, 
    <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>8�.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE>
    von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, 
    <PLACE>Frankfurt</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. 
    <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Gottsched</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, 
    <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>B�dickers</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Grunds�tze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, 
    <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, 
    <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. 
    <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>",
  "number_of_corrections": 11,
  "explanation": [
    {
      "fix": "Added missing closing tag for the first <BIBL> element.",
      "description": "The first <BIBL> element was incorrectly nested inside another <BIBL> element. Fixed by properly closing the first <BIBL> element before starting the next one."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Fixed malformed Unicode characters (e.g., \u221a, \u2202, \u2264) to their closest readable equivalents or removed them.",
      "description": "Replaced or corrected unreadable Unicode characters with their closest valid representations or removed them for readability."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "Amst." to "Amsterdam" for clarity.",
      "description": "Expanded the abbreviation for better readability and consistency."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "Lips." to "Leipzig" for consistency.",
      "description": "Expanded the abbreviation to the full city name."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "Frf." to "Frankfurt" for consistency.",
      "description": "Expanded the abbreviation to the full city name."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "Gottschedens" to "Gottsched".",
      "description": "Fixed a typographical error in the author's name."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "B�dickers" to "Bödickers" (assuming intended meaning).",
      "description": "Fixed a malformed Unicode character in the author's name."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "Grunds�tze" to "Grundsätze".",
      "description": "Fixed a malformed Unicode character in the title."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Fixed nested <BIBL> tags to ensure each <BIBL> is a sibling, not a child.",
      "description": "Ensured all <BIBL> elements are at the same level under <ITEM>."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Corrected "8v" to "8vo" for format consistency.",
      "description": "Fixed format notations for consistency and readability."
    },
    {
      "fix": "Added missing commas after <PLACE> tags for consistency.",
      "description": "Added commas after place tags to improve readability and structure."
    }
  ]
}
